title: UI transformation (stepper, cards, slide preview)
steps: Progress stepper: Context → Brainstorm → Build → Polish. Driven by metadata.phase.
Card-based messages: QuestionCard, ChecklistCard, SlideCard, TipCard. Driven by metadata.messageType. Plain text fallback.
Slide preview panel: split-pane in build/refine phases (chat 40% / preview 60%). Full-width in context/brainstorm.
Integration test: full flow through all phases. Verify responsive.
acceptance_criteria: Different card types render by message type
Slide preview appears in build/refine phases
Plain text fallback for old messages
